Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Lost Solitude
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +26% (augmented)
Pack Size: +7% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +36% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +15% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +90% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 82
--------
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
{ Suffix Modifier "of Drought" (Tier: 1) }
Players gain 31(35-30)% reduced Flask Charges
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 116(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 36(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "Flaming" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Ignited Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Obstruction" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters take 29(26-30)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Hits
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
